missing_perspectives.name: The Religious / Traditional Values Perspective
missing_perspectives.description: Families who choose homeschooling for religious or values-based reasons
missing_perspectives.why_missing_matters: This is the most common stated reason for homeschooling in surveys and is absent from the current graph

underrepresented_evidence.gap: No evidence presented for homeschooled students who do develop strong social skills
underrepresented_evidence.suggested_evidence: Research on homeschool co-ops and extracurricular participation rates

framing_issues.description: The graph frames this as a binary choice rather than a spectrum of hybrid approaches
framing_issues.suggested_reframe: Consider adding claims about hybrid/micro-school models

confidence_adjustments.rationale: The research base on homeschooling outcomes has significant selection bias issues
